plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: AI agents v12.0.0 — Reliability primitives: inter-subtask output contracts (provides/requires schema), pre-spawn dependency verification gate, scope-expansion adjudication (4-option escalation), effort-tier discipline (xhigh/high/medium across 12 agents), and hardened SubagentStop validation rejecting outputs_gap/toolset_gap drift. WORKER_RESULT schema bumped to v2 with outputs_verified[] + outputs_gap fields. Builds on v11.2.0 (opt-in GitHub Issues telemetry), v11.1.x (inline-execution guard, Phase 4.5 completion-tail invariant), v11.0 (self-heal), v10.3 layers. 12 agent roles, 48 reusable skills, 13 quality gate hooks, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
